system.description: Small message holders tied around the necks of the white rabbits that wander through Wonder's Cure Rooms. Each rabbit carries a cryptic clue about how to access the Basement. The messages include hints like: 'It's not always convenient to knock on a door with your hand,' 'Knocking on a door is the bare minimum to be expected of a respectable person,' and 'When you arrive at a door, it is polite to ask if anyone is home.' These clues, when understood together, reveal the formula: 'Is anyone under the house?' which opens the door painted on the floor in the Entrance Hall.
system.location: Cure Rooms - carried by White Rabbits
